content: Just integrated a manual Snippets override. Now the 'Cinematic Code' section stays populated even if the GitHub API is being shy. Optimization is key.
Refining the Physics-Based cursor. Added velocity calculations to handle squash and stretch. The UI finally feels tactile and responsive.
Implemented Phase 2 automation. The Journal is now decoupled from the HTML. Multi-layer parallax background is active. System Online.
TaskFlow is hitting 0.9.0. The Python backend is finally as stable as I want it. Pushing for that flagship release soon.
Exploring the concept of 'Cortisol Lowering' UI. Minimalist gold and neon accents against absolute black. It feels right.
